sections.paragraph:
Original: פּתרוס

Transliteration: pathrôs

Phonetic: path-roce'

BDB Definition:

Pathros = "region of the south"
  1. a part of Egypt and the home country of the Pathrusim people; probably located in upper Egypt

Origin: of Egyptian derivation

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
